name: Zucchini Fritata
recipeIngredient: 1 large zucchini (grated - 1 cup fresh corn or frozen)
Optional: fresh shrimp, shelled and deveined. Coarsely chop.
recipeInstructions:
1 Mix all ingredients well. The mixture should be thick.
2 Drop by the tablespoon onto a greased, hot griddle.
3 Cook until firm and lightly browned on both sides, turning once.
